name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: President Trump announced the creation of a new regional bloc, the “Shield of the Americas,” to coordinate action against narco-terrorism and counter China’s influence in Latin America.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Trump tells Latin American leaders, “I’m not learning your damn language.”

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Protests erupt in Havana after more than 60 hours without electricity, with demonstrations against the communist government spreading across the capital.

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Trump meets with El Salvador President Nayib Bukele.

name: Polymarket
fullText: BREAKING: Michael B. Jordan overtakes Timothée Chalamet as the projected 2026 Oscars Best Actor Winner. https://t.co/dZJIRXrSak
